_meta.description: Expected automation flow per component — maps to QC PDFs in D:/Author_Test_cases/

fill-in-the-blank.pdfFile: Author Test Cases - FIB test cases.pdf
setupFlow: Open launch URL — authoring editor loads
Select Generic Step → fill metadata wizard → Save
New Generic Step page appears in TOC — click to activate
Prepare Generic Step column for FIB drop (assessment zone)
Drop FIB into Generic Step column via scope.onDropComplete
Enter header + sentence dummy text on canvas
Create Generic Step via TOC + Add New Step
Drop Multiple Choice into Generic Step column
Drop MCQ Multiple into Generic Step column
